name: Earnings Result
description: Reported financial results or material operating update

name: Guidance Change
description: Initiated raised maintained or reduced forward guidance

name: Analyst Revision
description: Point-in-time estimate or rating revision from an identified provider

name: Regulatory Filing
description: Material filing with a regulator or exchange

name: Insider Transaction
description: Reported insider purchase sale or ownership change

name: Share Repurchase
description: Repurchase authorization expansion execution or suspension

name: Dividend Change
description: Dividend initiation increase reduction or suspension

name: Mergers and Acquisitions
description: Acquisition merger divestiture or strategic transaction

name: Management Change
description: CEO CFO chair or other material leadership transition

name: Product Launch
description: Material product platform service or capacity launch

name: Regulatory Action
description: Approval rejection investigation restriction or enforcement

name: Cybersecurity Incident
description: Material breach outage ransomware or security disclosure

name: Legal Event
description: Material litigation judgment settlement or liability development

name: Macro Event
description: Rates inflation policy trade or demand event linked to the security

name: Other
description: Auditable event not covered by another registry value
